Package i5.cb.graph

Class DiagramDesktop.DDMouseListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.event.MouseAdapter
      • javax.swing.event.MouseInputAdapter
        • i5.cb.graph.DiagramDesktop.DDMouseListener
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable
    Enclosing class:
    DiagramDesktop

    public class DiagramDesktop.DDMouseListener
extends javax.swing.event.MouseInputAdapter
implements java.io.Serializable
    This inner class enables a user to mark more than one node as selected at at a time. The user can draw a rectangle on the DiagramDesktopby dragging with their mouse. Afterwords, every DiagramNode being completely inside the rectange is selected.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      void mouseDragged​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
      This method is invoked when a user moves the mouse while a mousebutton (invocing mousePressed(java.awt.event.MouseEvent)) was pressed.
      void mousePressed​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
      This method is envoked when a user presses a mousebotton while the mousepointer is over the DiagramDesktop, but not over a DiagramNode.
      void mouseReleased​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
      This method is invoked when a user releases a mousebutton after dragging it over the DiagramDesktop.

      • DDMouseListener

        public DDMouseListener​()

    • Method Detail

      • mousePressed

        public void mousePressed​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
        This method is envoked when a user presses a mousebotton while the mousepointer is over the DiagramDesktop, but not over a DiagramNode. It stores one egde of the rectangle.
        Overrides:
        mousePressed in class java.awt.event.MouseAdapter
        Parameters:
        e - a MouseEvent value

      • mouseDragged

        public void mouseDragged​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
        This method is invoked when a user moves the mouse while a mousebutton (invocing mousePressed(java.awt.event.MouseEvent)) was pressed. It recalculates selectionRectand has it drawn by DiagramDesktop
        Overrides:
        mouseDragged in class java.awt.event.MouseAdapter
        Parameters:
        e - a MouseEvent value

      • mouseReleased

        public void mouseReleased​(java.awt.event.MouseEvent e)
        This method is invoked when a user releases a mousebutton after dragging it over the DiagramDesktop. In normal selection mode it clears the collection of selected nodes and sets those to be selected that are inside selectionRect. If Control is pressed, it inverts the selection status of every node inside selectionRect.
        Overrides:
        mouseReleased in class java.awt.event.MouseAdapter
        Parameters:
        e - a MouseEvent value
